name: ProcessManager
description: Process manager — list, inspect, and kill system processes. Complements Guardian's filesystem watch with runtime process visibility.
author: Victory

tools.name: proc_list
tools.description: List running processes. Optional name filter.

tools.name: proc_kill
tools.description: Kill a process by PID or name.

tools.name: proc_info
tools.description: Detailed info on a process by PID — CPU, RAM, threads, connections, cmdline.
